testcase.name: applies multiple cooking methods sequentially
different planetary positions produce different results
cooking methods affect final elemental balance
returns context value when inside AlchemicalProvider
does NOT throw when used outside AlchemicalProvider
returns default context values when outside provider
provides working helper functions from default context
returns null-ish safely when outside provider
provides default state values to children
catches errors and shows fallback UI
recovers when Try Again is clicked
adds default meal type if missing
should create alert when threshold is exceeded
should not create alert when threshold is not exceeded
should limit number of alerts returned
should return false for non-existent rule
should calculate cultural synergy for a single cuisine
should provide proximity bonus for same cultural group cuisines
should provide diversity bonus for different cultural groups
should return empty array for poor fusion potential
does not throw on any log level
accepts optional data argument without crashing
normalizes raw values to percentages summing to 1.0
returns default values for zero input
returns first element for equal values
returns true for sum of 1.05 (within tolerance)
scales normalized values to reference intensity
returns raw values unchanged when already raw
calculates element strength relative to average
formats raw values as percentage strings
calculates differences between two property sets
round-trip: normalize -> convert back preserves proportions
dominant element is consistent across normalization
relative strengths remain consistent after normalization
